reasoning: The baseline probability for any given team to win the 10-team IPL is 10%. On April 3, the market placed PBKS at 18% because they had started the season 2-0, with a league-best NRR of 1.485. However, as of April 13, 2025, PBKS has regressed. They suffered an 8-wicket loss to SRH on April 12 (failing to defend 246 runs) and have slipped to 6th place with a 3-2 record (6 points). Four teams (including unbeaten DC and top-ranked GT) sit ahead of them with 8 or more points. Pre-season odds had PBKS at 8.00 (implied probability ~12%). Given their fall to the middle of the pack after five games and a poor bowling performance in their most recent match, their championship chances should revert from the inflated 18% back to slightly below the league average of 10%. I estimate their current true probability at 9%.
